title: Finding Scan Copy of Comic Box 1997 End of Eva Magazine
display_title: Finding Scan Copy of Comic Box 1997 End of Eva Magazine
wikitext:
[]: Finding Scan/Copy of Comic Box 1997 End of Eva Magazine?             Quote Post by Ashwing » Mon Sep 26, 2022 3:19 pm Hey All - was looking at a magazine anime Archivist Ehoba was showcasing of Comic Box Magazine from Oct. 1997: https://twitter.com/htGOIW/status/1571703096396611584 It was a feature on End of Eva with lots of fan/doujin author commentary. I think it would make a great translation & scanning project but I have been unable to find a copy, either a digital scan or an existing listing. Mandarake has one for example but it is listed as sold out: https://order.mandarake.co.jp/order/detailPage/item?itemCode=1161605730&ref=list&categoryCode=100402&keyword=%E3%81%B5%E3%82%85%E3%83%BC%E3%81%98%E3%82%87%E3%82%93%E3%81%B7%E3%82%8D%E3%81%A0%E3%81%8F%E3%81%A8 If I have to give up the dream I will, but I thought I would ask around first - I messaged Ehoba but no luck there. Anyone know good Japanese retailers, has an archive of Comic Box scans, etc, that might be able to help? Will take any leads and ofc willing to pay for the product, just let me know!

[]: Re: Finding Scan/Copy of Comic Box 1997 End of Eva Magazine?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Sep 27, 2022 4:45 am This would certainly be very interesting!

Article: Finding Scan Copy of Comic Box 1997 End of Eva Magazine
[]: Finding Scan/Copy of Comic Box 1997 End of Eva Magazine?             Quote Post by Ashwing » Mon Sep 26, 2022 3:19 pm Hey All - was looking at a magazine anime Archivist Ehoba was showcasing of Comic Box Magazine from Oct. 1997: https://twitter.com/htGOIW/status/1571703096396611584 It was a feature on End of Eva with lots of fan/doujin author commentary. I think it would make a great translation & scanning project but I have been unable to find a copy, either a digital scan or an existing listing. Mandarake has one for example but it is listed as sold out: https://order.mandarake.co.jp/order/detailPage/item?itemCode=1161605730&ref=list&categoryCode=100402&keyword=%E3%81%B5%E3%82%85%E3%83%BC%E3%81%98%E3%82%87%E3%82%93%E3%81%B7%E3%82%8D%E3%81%A0%E3%81%8F%E3%81%A8 If I have to give up the dream I will, but I thought I would ask around first - I messaged Ehoba but no luck there. Anyone know good Japanese retailers, has an archive of Comic Box scans, etc, that might be able to help? Will take any leads and ofc willing to pay for the product, just let me know!

[]: Re: Finding Scan/Copy of Comic Box 1997 End of Eva Magazine?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Sep 27, 2022 4:45 am This would certainly be very interesting!
